content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 1, 2005

John Drayer
13739 Hanwell Avenue
Bellflower, CA 90706

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-136

Dear Mr. Drayer:

This letter confirms the receipt of your June 23, 2005, request for advice regarding Councilmember Dorothy King, and a potential conflict of interest. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless the council member has authorized you as his or her representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the enclosed complaint form with our Enforcement Division.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant Counsel, Legal Division

Enclosure
WJL:rd
